data.revised_prompt: An incredibly realistic digital representation of a natural candid corporate headshot featuring a young attractive blonde woman of Caucasian descent, in her early twenties (around 24-26 years old). She is seen smiling subtly, her face reflecting genuine happiness. Her skin texture is natural, including minor imperfections that contribute to her authenticity. The lighting is realistic with soft shadows, enhancing the overall modulation and realism. The woman is professionally dressed in a navy blazer, her authenticity reflecting in every aspect of the image. This picture has the aesthetics of a shot taken with a professional DSLR camera and resonates with the raw, unfiltered style one can see in photojournalism. The subject of the image is a real human being, not AI generated.
